info.title: SDKWork BirdCoder Coding Server API
info.description: OpenAPI 3.1 schema generated from the live BirdCoder unified same-port API gateway.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: SDKWork IAM authentication and session resources.

tags.name: collaboration
tags.description: Workspace collaboration and team catalog resources.

tags.name: commerce
tags.description: Commerce membership, package catalog, entitlement, order, and payment resources.

tags.name: iam
tags.description: IAM user, tenant, organization, role, permission, policy, and audit resources.

tags.name: intelligence
tags.description: Coding session, checkpoint, approval, and question resources.

tags.name: platform
tags.description: Workspace, project, release, deployment, and delivery resources.

tags.name: runtime
tags.description: Runtime engine, model, native session, and local operation resources.

tags.name: skills
tags.description: Skill package catalog and installation resources.

tags.name: system
tags.description: System descriptor, health, route catalog, and runtime metadata resources.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified runtime-location identifier bound when the coding session was created. Legacy sessions may omit this field and cannot execute or trigger native-session discovery.

sortTimestamp.description: Normalized activity timestamp in epoch milliseconds used for sorting.

transcriptUpdatedAt.description: Most recent transcript mutation timestamp, when available.

sequence.description: Event sequence number serialized as an exact decimal string.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified runtime-location identifier bound when the coding session was created. Legacy sessions may omit this field and cannot execute or trigger native-session discovery.

sortTimestamp.description: Normalized activity timestamp in epoch milliseconds used for sorting.

transcriptUpdatedAt.description: Most recent transcript mutation timestamp, when available.

discoveryMode.description: Discovery mode for native engine session inventory.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Values are sanitized by the runtime boundary.

topP.description: Nucleus sampling value. Values are sanitized by the runtime boundary.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified project runtime-location identifier required for coding-session execution.

stream.description: Whether the turn should stream message.delta events. Defaults to true.

metadata.description: Free-form JSON metadata owned by the caller and validated by the service.

updated.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

unreadCount.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

metricValue.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

metadata.description: Free-form JSON metadata owned by the caller and validated by the service.

total.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.
Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

used.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

limit.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

remaining.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

metricValue.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

maxStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

usedStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

maxStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

usedStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

maxStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

usedStorage.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

budgetAmount.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

sandboxId.description: Opaque Drive sandbox identifier. This reference does not grant Drive access.

rootEntryId.description: Opaque Drive entry identifier selected as the project root.

logicalPath.description: Canonical sandbox-relative path using forward-slash segments. Empty means the sandbox root.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

BirdCoderProjectWorkspaceBinding.description: BirdCoder-owned binding to a Drive sandbox directory. Physical paths, provider roots, browser handles, and Tauri paths are never stored or returned. Every filesystem operation must authorize against Drive again.

logicalPath.description: Canonical sandbox-relative path using forward-slash segments. Empty means the sandbox root.

rootLocator.description: Opaque, path-free runtime target locator. It is not a filesystem path.

displayName.description: Safe display label for this location.

hasAbsolutePath.description: Whether encrypted absolute path material is registered. The path itself is never returned.

gitRepositoryUrl.description: Credential-free sanitized Git repository URL reported by a trusted target.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.
Optimistic concurrency version used with the If-Match request header.

rootLocator.description: Opaque, path-free target locator. Do not provide a relative or absolute filesystem path.

absolutePath.description: Write-only absolute path for encrypted-at-rest registration. It is never returned.

displayName.description: Safe display label for the registered location.
Safe display label for the runtime location.

rootLocator.description: Opaque, path-free target locator. Do not provide a relative or absolute filesystem path.

absolutePath.description: Write-only replacement absolute path for encrypted-at-rest registration. It is never returned.

displayName.description: Safe display label for the rebound location.

runtimeLocationId.description: Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.
Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.

Verified project runtime-location identifier used for Git execution.

installCount.description: Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.
Java Long/BIGINT value serialized as an exact decimal string.

status.description: Known values include active and archived.

category.description: Known values include community, saas, and mine.

status.description: Known values include active and archived.

environmentKey.description: Known values include dev, test, staging, and prod.

runtime.description: Known values include web, desktop, server, container, and kubernetes.

releaseKind.description: Known values include formal, canary, hotfix, rollback.

status.description: Known values include pending, ready, running, succeeded, failed, rolled_back.

get.description: Get coding session. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

404.description: Coding session was not found.

500.description: Coding session summary could not be read.

delete.description: Delete coding session. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

404.description: Coding session was not found.

500.description: Coding session could not be deleted.

patch.description: Update coding session. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

400.description: Coding session update request is invalid.

404.description: Coding session was not found.

500.description: Coding session could not be updated.

get.description: List coding sessions. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single workspace.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single project.

parameters.name: runtimeLocationId
parameters.description: Optional verified project runtime-location identifier. When absent, only persisted coding-session projections are returned; native-session discovery is not attempted.

parameters.name: engineId
parameters.description: Filter resources to a single code engine.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: One-based page number used for offset-mode pagination.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20 and must not exceed 200.

200.description: Unified coding session inventory returned successfully.

500.description: Unified coding session inventory could not be read.

503.description: The selected coding-session runtime location is unavailable for native-session discovery.

post.description: Create coding session. Requires an authenticated BirdCoder user session.

400.description: Coding session creation request is invalid.

500.description: Coding session could not be created.

503.description: The selected coding-session runtime location is unavailable.
